allow: Bash(touch app.py .env requirements.txt static/index.html static/style.css static/app.js)

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial release: Multi-thread chat with Claude

Features:
- Main thread and isolated bubble threads
- Streaming AI responses
- Manual web search via Tavily API
- Create bubble threads from any AI response
EOF
)")
Bash("/d/conda/python.exe" -m pip install pandas openpyxl PyPDF2 Pillow)

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add ChatGPT-style UI and file upload feature

Features:
- ChatGPT-style dark theme UI
- Sidebar with chat history
- New chat button
- localStorage for persistent history
- File upload support (images, Excel, PDF, TXT)
- Attach button with file preview
- Tangent logo in sidebar
EOF
)")
